Operation sequence and Sample code sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” View page source sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” ¶ usage : s [ 1 ~ 2 ( slot )] - Select content g [ 0 ( content ), 1 ( thumbnail ), 2 ( screennail )] - Get content d - Delete content ip < 192.168.1.2 ( ip of this PC ) > - set ip of this PC p [ 1 ( start ), 2 ( stop ), 4 ( resume ), 5 ( pause ), 6 ( seek )] - Playback content To exit , please enter 'q' . “Playback content” exports elementary streams to temp.hevc and temp.aac. Please MUX them by using a tool such as ffmpeg. example : ffmpeg - i temp . hevc - i temp . aac - c copy output . mp4 Save the following code as “RemoteCli.cpp”, replace “app/RemoteCli.cpp” in the SDK, then build. Operation sequence and Sample code sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” View page source sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” ¶ usage : s [ 1 ~ 2 ( slot )] - Select content g [ 0 ( content ), 1 ( thumbnail ), 2 ( screennail )] - Get content d - Delete content ip < 192.168.1.2 ( ip of this PC ) > - set ip of this PC p [ 1 ( start ), 2 ( stop ), 4 ( resume ), 5 ( pause ), 6 ( seek )] - Playback content To exit , please enter 'q' . “Playback content” exports elementary streams to temp.hevc and temp.aac. Please MUX them by using a tool such as ffmpeg. example : ffmpeg - i temp . hevc - i temp . aac - c copy output . mp4 Save the following code as “RemoteCli.cpp”, replace “app/RemoteCli.cpp” in the SDK, then build. sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” ¶ usage : s [ 1 ~ 2 ( slot )] - Select content g [ 0 ( content ), 1 ( thumbnail ), 2 ( screennail )] - Get content d - Delete content ip < 192.168.1.2 ( ip of this PC ) > - set ip of this PC p [ 1 ( start ), 2 ( stop ), 4 ( resume ), 5 ( pause ), 6 ( seek )] - Playback content To exit , please enter 'q' . “Playback content” exports elementary streams to temp.hevc and temp.aac. Please MUX them by using a tool such as ffmpeg. example : ffmpeg - i temp . hevc - i temp . aac - c copy output . mp4 Save the following code as “RemoteCli.cpp”, replace “app/RemoteCli.cpp” in the SDK, then build. sample code - “pull/delete/playback content in RemoteTransferMode” ¶ usage : s [ 1 ~ 2 ( slot )] - Select content g [ 0 ( content ), 1 ( thumbnail ), 2 ( screennail )] - Get content d - Delete content ip < 192.168.1.2 ( ip of this PC ) > - set ip of this PC p [ 1 ( start ), 2 ( stop ), 4 ( resume ), 5 ( pause ), 6 ( seek )] - Playback content To exit , please enter 'q' . “Playback content” exports elementary streams to temp.hevc and temp.aac. Please MUX them by using a tool such as ffmpeg. example : ffmpeg - i temp . hevc - i temp . aac - c copy output . mp4 Save the following code as “RemoteCli.cpp”, replace “app/RemoteCli.cpp” in the SDK, then build.
